title: Bregius Golthan

'''Bregius Golthan''' was an [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]]. A massive, but unnaturally lean man, he dressed, like many of the Advisors, in dark robes and a peculiar hat. He also boasted a group of four elite [[Imperial Bodyguard]]s and [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] under his command bore his personal insignia on their command towers. Stationed on [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], he was personally assigned by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to [[Ministry of Security (Galactic Empire)|oversee security]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was appointed by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] to hunt down [[Dirk Harkness]] and the [[Black Curs]], who had made a reconnaissance mission for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] deep into the Imperial [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="BCC">{{JournalCite|8|Black Curs Blues}}</ref>

He took command of a task force of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], led by the command ship [[Vengeance (Golthan)|''Vengeance'']], but in orbit above [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]], he found himself clashing with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Utoxx Prentioch]], an ambitious [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] who wanted to claim the Black Curs' intelligence for himself. On the planet [[Canyon]], he captured [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], and took her to his [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] of [[Voktunma]].

Although Harkness and his team successfully rescued Okeefe and severely damaged Golthan's stronghold, the Advisor himself survived.

He was subsequently killed over Wroona when he was refitting his ship after a battle against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and preparing for a renewed strike on [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]]. Harkness and [[Jai Raventhorn]] infiltrated the vessel and planted mines to destroy it. While withdrawing from the vessel, they encountered the Advisor, and Golthan was killed by Harkness in the subsequent skirmish.
